name: Coastguard
overview: An inside look at the lifesaving work of the Maritime and Coastguard Agency. For over 10 months we let the cameras inside the Maritime and Coastguard Agency, a government agency which HM Coastguard is part of that works to prevent the loss of life on the coast and at sea.

trailers.title: TRAILER: Coastguard: Every Second Counts 9pm Sundays Channel 5.
